problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Electrospun. Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
